[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111 5
1 1001111 5
2 0010000 1
3 1111100 5
4 1001000 2
5 0100101 3
6 1100101 4
7 1111111 a

70 07 1011111 6
